name: claude-in-codex
description: A Codex plugin that runs your local Claude Code from inside Codex through a built-in /claude skill and a portable bridge.

interface.shortDescription: Run Claude Code inside Codex with a built-in /claude skill
interface.longDescription: Claude in Codex runs your local Claude Code from inside Codex through a bundled /claude skill and a small portable bridge. It prefers a native local runner for rich realtime streaming and falls back to a Node bridge when none is installed. The plugin reuses your existing claude CLI, authentication, model access, and environment — no hosted relay, no telemetry.
defaultPrompt: Use Claude in Codex to implement this feature.
Use Claude in Codex for a second-opinion review of this change.
Use Claude in Codex to investigate or debug this issue.
Use Claude in Codex to polish the layout, spacing, and responsive behavior of this page.
